title: Abandoned
content:
Every since the first day of the company, I have been leaving home at 5:50-6am in the morning and arrived back in my comfy room around 10pm. %(me)Main reason is I want to avoid the rush-hour traffic!% I usually go to bed about 11-11:30pm. And I usually spend most of Saturday in bed. Sunday, I try to go to church if possible -- otherwise, in bed.

As a result, my old workstation (the desk in my bedroom, that is) was pretty much abandoned. I just realized about that when I looked at the desk this morning.

!https://macsfvent.sgp1.cdn.digitaloceanspaces.com/media/misc/messy_desk.jpg!

Hmmm ...
